channel.title: Matlab on Worldpotato
channel.description: Recent content in Matlab on Worldpotato

item.title: Progress of my bachelor thesis
item.description: My last post is some time ago. Mostly because I had no motivation to write a new post and I don’t want that blog to be a “I have to do that”-thing. Actually I started to write a new post but never finished it and now it is really outdated so let me start again. Let me start with the thermal camera. It’s an Optris PI400 and the ROS node is on GitHub and the driver is easy to download and install.
